commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
Adds per-group QQBot command levels (`all`, `safety`, and `strict`) and rejects group commands classified as private-only with a private-chat guidance reply.

PR surface: Source +254, Tests +140. Total +394 across 18 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source with high confidence: configure a QQBot group with `commandLevel: "strict"` and invoke a dynamically generated command such as `/dock-telegram`; it is classified as unknown and continues into normal routing.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The strict-mode bypass has a narrow mechanical repair and regression-test path; owner acceptance of the default and contributor live proof remain separate merge gates.

target.title: Gate private QQBot group commands
target.body:
## Summary

- Add QQBot-local command visibility classification for OpenClaw core slash commands.
- Add per-group `commandLevel` config alongside `requireMention`:
  - `all`: allow all core and QQBot plugin slash commands in the group.
  - `safety`: default behavior; keep safe/group-session commands usable and reject sensitive private-only commands.
  - `strict`: only allow core `/new` and `/reset` in the group.
- Reject private-only core slash commands in QQ groups after ingress access and mention gating, with a private-chat-only message.
- Reuse the same private-chat-only message for QQBot plugin slash commands marked `c2cOnly`.

Example:

```json
{
  "channels": {
    "qqbot": {
      "groups": {
        "GROUP_OPENID": {
          "requireMention": false,
          "commandLevel": "safety"
        }
      }
    }
  }
}
```

Existing `groups.<id>.requireMention` config remains valid; omitting `commandLevel` defaults to `safety`.

## Command levels

### `all`

Allows every known OpenClaw core command in QQ groups:

`/help`, `/commands`, `/tools`, `/skill`, `/status`, `/goal`, `/diagnostics`, `/crestodian`, `/tasks`, `/allowlist`, `/approve`, `/context`, `/btw`, `/side`, `/export-session`, `/export`, `/export-trajectory`, `/trajectory`, `/tts`, `/whoami`, `/id`, `/session`, `/subagents`, `/acp`, `/focus`, `/unfocus`, `/agents`, `/steer`, `/tell`, `/config`, `/mcp`, `/plugins`, `/plugin`, `/debug`, `/usage`, `/stop`, `/restart`, `/activation`, `/send`, `/new`, `/reset`, `/compact`, `/think`, `/thinking`, `/t`, `/verbose`, `/v`, `/trace`, `/fast`, `/reasoning`, `/reason`, `/elevated`, `/elev`, `/exec`, `/model`, `/models`, `/queue`, `/bash`

Allows every known QQBot plugin command in QQ groups:

`/bot-help`, `/bot-me`, `/bot-ping`, `/bot-version`, `/bot-upgrade`, `/bot-logs`, `/bot-clear-storage`, `/bot-streaming`, `/bot-approve`, `/bot-group-allways`

Blocks:

No known command is blocked by this level. Unknown slash text still follows the existing routing path.

### `safety` default

Allows these OpenClaw core commands in QQ groups:

`/help`, `/status`, `/btw`, `/side`, `/models`, `/stop`, `/goal`, `/usage`, `/activation`, `/send`, `/new`, `/reset`, `/compact`, `/think`, `/thinking`, `/t`, `/verbose`, `/v`, `/fast`, `/reasoning`, `/reason`, `/model`, `/queue`

Allows these QQBot plugin commands in QQ groups:

`/bot-help`, `/bot-ping`

Blocks with the private-chat-only message:

`/commands`, `/tools`, `/skill`, `/diagnostics`, `/crestodian`, `/tasks`, `/allowlist`, `/approve`, `/context`, `/export-session`, `/export`, `/export-trajectory`, `/trajectory`, `/tts`, `/whoami`, `/id`, `/session`, `/subagents`, `/acp`, `/focus`, `/unfocus`, `/agents`, `/steer`, `/tell`, `/config`, `/mcp`, `/plugins`, `/plugin`, `/debug`, `/restart`, `/trace`, `/elevated`, `/elev`, `/exec`, `/bash`

Blocks these QQBot plugin commands with the private-chat-only message:

`/bot-me`, `/bot-version`, `/bot-upgrade`, `/bot-logs`, `/bot-clear-storage`, `/bot-streaming`, `/bot-approve`, `/bot-group-allways`

### `strict`

Allows only these OpenClaw core commands in QQ groups:

`/new`, `/reset`

Blocks with the private-chat-only message:

Every other known OpenClaw core command.

Blocks every known QQBot plugin command in QQ groups:

`/bot-help`, `/bot-me`, `/bot-ping`, `/bot-version`, `/bot-upgrade`, `/bot-logs`, `/bot-clear-storage`, `/bot-streaming`, `/bot-approve`, `/bot-group-allways`

## Command descriptions

- `/help`: show available command help.
- `/commands`: list slash commands.
- `/tools`: list available runtime tools.
- `/skill`: run a named skill.
- `/status`: show current runtime status.
- `/goal`: show or control the current agent task goal.
- `/diagnostics`: explain Gateway diagnostics and Codex feedback upload options.
- `/crestodian`: run the Crestodian setup and repair helper.
- `/tasks`: list background tasks for this session.
- `/allowlist`: list, add, or remove allowlist entries.
- `/approve`: approve or deny exec requests.
- `/context`: explain how context is built and used.
- `/btw`, `/side`: ask a side question without changing future session context.
- `/export-session`, `/export`: export the current session to HTML.
- `/export-trajectory`, `/trajectory`: export a JSONL trajectory bundle.
- `/tts`: control text-to-speech.
- `/whoami`, `/id`: show the sender id.
- `/session`: manage session-level settings.
- `/subagents`: inspect subagent runs.
- `/acp`: manage ACP sessions and runtime options.
- `/focus`: bind the current thread/topic/conversation to a session target.
- `/unfocus`: remove the current binding.
- `/agents`: list thread-bound agents for this session.
- `/steer`, `/tell`: send guidance to the active run.
- `/config`: show or set config values.
- `/mcp`: show or set OpenClaw MCP servers.
- `/plugins`, `/plugin`: list, show, enable, or disable plugins.
- `/debug`: set runtime debug overrides.
- `/usage`: control usage footer or cost summary.
- `/stop`: stop the current run.
- `/restart`: restart OpenClaw.
- `/activation`: set group activation mode.
- `/send`: set send policy.
- `/new`: start a new session.
- `/reset`: reset the current session.
- `/compact`: compact session context.
- `/think`, `/thinking`, `/t`: set thinking level.
- `/verbose`, `/v`: toggle verbose mode.
- `/trace`: toggle plugin trace lines.
- `/fast`: toggle fast mode.
- `/reasoning`, `/reason`: toggle reasoning visibility.
- `/elevated`, `/elev`: toggle elevated mode.
- `/exec`: set exec defaults for this session.
- `/model`: show or set the model.
- `/models`: list model providers/models.
- `/queue`: adjust queue settings.
- `/bash`: run host shell commands.
- `/bot-help`: show QQBot built-in commands.
- `/bot-me`: show the current QQ sender account id.
- `/bot-ping`: test OpenClaw host to QQ latency.
- `/bot-version`: show OpenClaw framework and QQBot plugin versions.
- `/bot-upgrade`: show QQBot upgrade guidance.
- `/bot-logs`: export recent local OpenClaw logs.
- `/bot-clear-storage`: clean QQBot-generated downloaded files.
- `/bot-streaming`: view or toggle QQBot streaming messages.
- `/bot-approve`: manage exec approval config.
- `/bot-group-allways`: change group default response mode.

## Verification

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/qqbot/src/config.test.ts extensions/qqbot/src/engine/config/group.test.ts extensions/qqbot/src/engine/commands/command-visibility.test.ts extensions/qqbot/src/engine/commands/slash-commands-impl.test.ts extensions/qqbot/src/bridge/commands/framework-registration.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/qqbot/src/engine/gateway/outbound-dispatch.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p tsconfig.extensions.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/extensions.tsbuildinfo`
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check extensions/qqbot/src/engine/config/group.ts extensions/qqbot/src/engine/config/group.test.ts extensions/qqbot/src/config-schema.ts extensions/qqbot/src/config.test.ts extensions/qqbot/src/engine/commands/command-visibility.ts extensions/qqbot/src/engine/commands/command-visibility.test.ts extensions/qqbot/src/engine/commands/slash-commands.ts extensions/qqbot/src/engine/commands/slash-command-handler.ts extensions/qqbot/src/engine/commands/slash-commands-impl.test.ts extensions/qqbot/src/bridge/commands/framework-context-adapter.ts extensions/qqbot/src/bridge/commands/framework-registration.ts extensions/qqbot/src/bridge/commands/framework-registration.test.ts extensions/qqbot/src/engine/gateway/inbound-context.ts extensions/qqbot/src/engine/gateway/stages/group-gate-stage.ts extensions/qqbot/src/engine/gateway/stages/envelope-stage.test.ts extensions/qqbot/src/engine/gateway/gateway.ts extensions/qqbot/src/types.ts extensions/qqbot/openclaw.plugin.json`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main`

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
